title: Clone Allowlist Draft
description: Phase 6A allowlist draft for skill repository quarantine review. Reviewer decisions applied (2026-05-27): 2 planning_approved, 3 deferred. No clone authorized.

entries.notes: Skill evaluation framework. Phase 6B source lock planning authorized (NO clone). Planning scope: source lock plan, commit/URL locking scheme, quarantine path draft, static review checklist.

Code understanding tool. Phase 6B source lock planning authorized (NO clone). Planning scope: source lock plan, commit/URL locking scheme, quarantine path draft, static review checklist with focus on verifying no destructive capabilities.
External code capability. Deferred by reviewer. Re-evaluate after medium-risk workflow (Taste-Skill + Understand Anything) completes full source lock planning cycle.
Web search integration. Deferred by reviewer. Re-evaluate after medium-risk workflow completes and network isolation patterns are established.
Agent skills collection (Chinese). Deferred by reviewer. Re-evaluate after medium-risk workflow completes and sub-skill categorization methodology is defined.
